script: TS=$(date +%s); P=0; S=0; N=0; F=0; for f in /home/azureuser/*-responder.py; do NAME=$(basename $f .py); SVC=${NAME}.service; CUR=$(grep -E 'if len\(reply\) > [0-9]+' $f | head -1); if [ -z "$CUR" ]; then echo "  $NAME: no cap pattern (skip)"; N=$((N+1)); continue; fi; NUM=$(echo "$CUR" | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); if [ "$NUM" = "7000" ]; then echo "  $NAME: already 7000 (skip)"; S=$((S+1)); continue; fi; cp -f $f $f.bak-cap7k-$TS; sed -i -E 's/if len\(reply\) > [0-9]+/if len(reply) > 7000/; s/reply\[:[0-9]+\]/reply[:6900]/' $f; if ! grep -qE 'if len\(reply\) > 7000' $f; then echo "  $NAME: EDIT FAILED — restoring"; cp -f $f.bak-cap7k-$TS $f; F=$((F+1)); continue; fi; if sudo systemctl restart $SVC 2>/dev/null; then ST=$(systemctl is-active $SVC); echo "  $NAME: $NUM -> 7000  restart=$ST"; P=$((P+1)); else echo "  $NAME: $NUM -> 7000  RESTART FAILED"; F=$((F+1)); fi; done; echo; echo "Summary: patched=$P  already_7000=$S  no_pattern=$N  failed=$F"
